'''Vrobals''' were a type of carnivorous [[Swine|pig]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. They had a large [[Nose/Legends|snout]], long [[Ear/Legends|ears]], a tail and light-colored leathery hide.<ref name="Empire Divided" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Vrobals are almost identical to [[Roba/Legends|Robas]], as the developers of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' used the same [[Wikipedia:3D modeling|3D model]] to create both creatures.
